title: Release v0.5.13

sources.reason: Advance canonical public release from v0.5.12 to v0.5.13 after compatibility CI fix on main.
CI fix included in this patch release.
Defines consistency requirements for public release references.

riskAssessment.reason: Patch release synchronizes public install references after a verified CI fix.

executionDecision.reason: User approved full v0.5.13 release; compatibility workflow passed on main.

preReviewWarnings: check-release-distribution passes only after the immutable v0.5.13 tag is visible on the public remote.
acceptance: Public installer, documentation, examples, and install script tests reference v0.5.13.
make quality and documentation metadata checks pass.
Repository is ready for v0.5.13 tag commit and push.
guidelines: Treat release.json as the canonical public release version.
Keep installer defaults, documentation, examples, and direct tests synchronized.
Do not move or overwrite an existing public tag.
Do not include unrelated .kiro files in release commits.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert release metadata bump and restore v0.5.12 references.
